candidate_definition_hints.text: `radian` is no longer under active development. While I may address critical or obvious bugs, no new features will be added. If you are looking for an active alternative, I recommend checking out [arf](https://github.com/eitsupi/arf) by @eitsupi.

source_context_snippet: `radian` is no longer under active development. While I may address critical or obvious bugs, no new features will be added. If you are looking for an active alternative, I recommend checking out [arf](https://github.com/eitsupi/arf) by @eitsupi.
